summary: The implementation successfully connects the admin dashboard to the backend database. All 5 requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5) are implemented with backend query functions, frontend hooks, and component connections. However, there are some discrepancies in the stats calculation timeframe (30 days vs 7 days requested) and a non-requested utility file was removed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Function returns count of assessments submitted in last 7 days
missing_requirements.reason: Backend implementation calculates recent submissions for last 30 days instead of 7 days as specified. The function uses 30 * 24 * 3600 * 1_000_000_000 nanoseconds instead of 7 days.

missing_requirements.requirement: Recent Submissions card shows count of assessments from last 7 days
missing_requirements.reason: QuickStatsCards displays '30 days' subtitle instead of '7 days' as requested, and the backend returns 30-day data.

hallucinated_features.description: Removed utility file adminStatsCalculator.ts without any requirement to do so
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention removing or deleting any files. The file frontend/src/utils/adminStatsCalculator.ts was removed but this was not requested.
